title: Advocating the use of a result-based payment scheme (RBPS) for maintaining the supply of public goods from High Nature Value (HNV) farmland in Bulgaria
description: A guide advocating for a result-based payment scheme to support the delivery of environmental public goods from High Nature Value farmland in Bulgaria. It outlines the principles of RBPS and provides practical lessons for piloting such schemes under the Bulgarian CAP Strategic Plan for 2023-2027.
